name: claude-mind-manager
description: Region-based context management for Claude Code. 5 commands: /mind-claudemd (create/audit/optimize CLAUDE.md), /mind-memory (MEMORY.md management), /mind-rules (rules validation/creation), /mind-files (project setup per type), /mind-update (fast context sweep). 2 agents, 1 hook (pre-compact backup). Zero dependencies.
